message:
fix(ci): make node_shim_integration tests cross-platform

- path_join_with_os_tmpdir: use path.isAbsolute() instead of startsWith("/")
- path_join_with_os_homedir: accept both forward and back slash separators
- os_eol_is_newline: accept both \n (Unix) and \r\n (Windows)
- os_platform_matches_process_platform: add diagnostic output for mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
